title: Mundicide
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Mundi}}
{{MultipleIssues|citation|expand}}
[[File:Alderaanexplosion.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Alderaan is destroyed by the Death Star]]
'''Mundicide''' was the destruction of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] or similar celestial object. Various degrees of mundicide occurred throughout history, caused by such things as [[Supernova/Legends|supernovae]], [[Superlaser/Legends|superlasers]] such as the [[Galaxy Gun]] or the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]], gravitational weaponry such as [[Centerpoint Station]], or other [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]]. Some planets, while not completely destroyed, were rendered uninhabitable, such as [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] and [[Uphrades]]. The deliberate destruction of a planet, such as the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]], was sometimes comparable to [[speciecide]] due to wiping out a significant portion of the planet's population.

==Completely destroyed==
===Destroyed by solar expansions, solar explosions, or [[Supernova/Legends|supernovae]]===
*The four innermost planets in the [[Carosus system]], including [[Carosi IV]]—circa [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]]—Destroyed during the expansion of the [[Carosus system|system's]] star, [[Carosi]]
*[[Clak'dor I]]—circa [[8000 BBY]]—Destroyed during the expansion of the [[Colu system|system's]] star, [[Colu/Legends|Colu]]
*[[Demophon]], [[Derr]], [[Enarc (Demophon system)|Enarc]], [[Jatee]], and [[Zenobah]]—circa [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]—Destroyed when the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system's]] [[Demophon (star)|sun]] naturally went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]
*[[Flankers]]—Destroyed sometime after [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] when its sun exploded
*[[Kashi]]—circa [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]]—Destroyed when its system's star suddenly went supernova
*[[Mindor/Legends|Mindor]]—Destroyed by solar flares caused by the [[Gravity mine/Legends|Gravity mine]] falling into the system's star, [[Taspan]], See [[Battle of Mindor]]
*[[Ryyk]]—circa [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]—Destroyed by supernova
*[[Shadda-Bi-Boran/Legends|Shadda-Bi-Boran]]—[[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]]—Destroyed when its sun went supernova
*[[Tililix]]—[[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]]—Destroyed when its sun went supernova.
*[[Worxer]]—[[232 BBY/Legends|232 BBY]]—Destroyed when its sun went supernova

===Destroyed by weapons, by [[Yo'gand's Core]] tactic, or by usage of the Force===
====Centerpoint Station====
*[[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]]—[[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]—Destroyed by Centerpoint Station
**Thanta Zilbra Moon #1—[[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]—Destroyed by Centerpoint Station
**Thanta Zilbra Moon #2—[[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]—Destroyed by Centerpoint Station
*[[Hordon Cal]]—[[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]]—Destroyed by Centerpoint Station

====Death Star====
*[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]—[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]—Destroyed by [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]], See [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]]
*[[Despayre]]—[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]—Destroyed by [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]
*[[Garrison Moon]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]—[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]—Destroyed by the [[Death Star prototype]]

====Galaxy Gun====
*[[Byss/Legends|Byss]]—[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]—Destroyed when the [[Galaxy Gun]] was rammed by the [[Eclipse II]], causing a missile to fall on the planet
*[[Da Soocha V]]—[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]—Destroyed by [[Galaxy Gun]]
*[[Hirsi]]—[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]—Destroyed by [[Galaxy Gun]]
*[[Krinemonen]]—[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]—Destroyed by [[Galaxy Gun]]

====Sith artifacts/the Force====
*[[Oblis]]—sometime before [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]—shattered by the [[darkstaff]]
*The three surrounding planets of [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]]—[[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]—Destroyed when [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] used [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]] to [[Supernova (Sith magic)|create]] a supernova.
*[[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]] planets, including [[Urkupp]]—[[3996 BBY]]—Destroyed when [[Aleema Keto]] caused the [[Cron Supernova/Legends|Cron Supernova]] through Sith magic.

====Sun Crusher====
*Every planet in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]]—[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]—Destroyed by the [[Sun Crusher]]
*[[Eol Sha]]—[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]—Destroyed by the [[Sun Crusher]]

====Yo'gand's Core====
[[File:Falcon_Sernpidalboom.jpg|thumb|Sernpidal is ravaged via Yo'gand's Core]]
*[[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]], its moon [[Indobok]], and [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]]—[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]
*[[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]] and its moon, [[Dobido]]—[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]
*[[Ygziir]]—circa [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]
*[[Yuuzhan'tar]]—circa [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]

====Other superweapons====
*[[Vultar]]. ([[4250 BBY]]) Destroyed by the [[Cosmic Turbine]]. See the [[Vultar Cataclysm]] for more detail.
*[[Malachor V]]. ([[3951 BBY]]) Destroyed by the [[Mass Shadow Generator/Legends|Mass Shadow Generator]]. See [[Battle of Malachor]] for more detail.
*[[Uphrades]]. ([[3643 BBY]]) Destroyed by [[Desolator (superweapon)|Desolator superweapon]] during the [[Desolator crisis|homonimous crisis]].
*[[Ova]]. ([[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]]) Destroyed when it collapsed in upon itself, possibly caused by an [[Infinity Wave]].
*[[Unidentified Mustafar system planetoid]] ([[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]) Destroyed by the [[Conqueror (superlaser)|''Conqueror'']].
*[[Aeten II/Legends|Aeten II]]. Destroyed by the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].
*[[Helska IV]]. ([[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]) Core is frozen and shattered by [[Shieldship]]s.

====Conventional weapons====
*[[Boreleo]]—[[44 ABY]]—Destroyed by [[Baradium missile]]s
*[[Carida/Legends|Carida's]] [[Mascot Moon]]—[[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]]—Blown up by [[Mako Spince]] in an attempt to remove the Academy's logo from the moon using [[antimatter]] (this was intended to be a prank)
*[[Oseon 5792]] (an asteroid)—rammed with hyperdrive engine.
*[[Uba III]]—[[1800 BBY]]— [[Bombardment of the Uba system|destroyed]] during the [[New Sith Wars]] by Ubese weapon systems.<ref name="AA">''[[Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
*[[Ugor homeworld]] and other worlds of the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]]—Destroyed by the [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]] to make way for a system-spanning junkyard.<ref name="SH">[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]</ref><ref name="GG4-1">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>
*[[Ord Dycoll]]—[[19 BBY/Legends|19]]-[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]—Accidentally destroyed by an ancient [[Drill ship (mining starship)|drill ship]].

===Means of destruction unclear===
*[[Kira I]]<ref name="TSoK">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref>
*[[Kira II]]<ref name="TSoK" />
*[[Kira III]]<ref name="TSoK" />
*Planets of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]]—Likely the result of continual [[Flamewind of Oseon/Legends|Flamewind]] bombardment.
*[[Palawa]]—before [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]]—The [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] was somehow involved.
*[[Polis Massa/Legends|Polis Massa]]—long before [[519 BBY/Legends|519 BBY]]—was shattered in an unknown cataclysm.

===Other completely destroyed planets/bodies===
*[[Brath Qella]]'s Moon #1—Between [[145 BBY|145]] and 140 BBY—Destroyed when it collided with "Brath Qella's Moon #2"
*Brath Qella's Moon #2—Between [[145 BBY|145]] and 140 BBY—Destroyed when it collided with "Brath Qella's Moon #1"
*[[Peragus II]]—millennia prior to [[3951 BBY]]—Crust shattered by a fuel-mining explosion; resulting asteroid field later destroyed by the [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']] in [[3951 BBY]].
*[[Shi'kar homeworld]]—prior to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]—Destroyed by a comet before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Rendered uninhabitable==
===Bombardment by Jedi, Sith, Imperial, Republic, or other non-Yuuzhan-Vong forces===
*[[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]]—[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]—Bombarded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], with help of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]
*[[Callos]]—[[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]—Bombarded by the Galactic Empire; during the bombardment, [[Black Eight Squadron]] was ordered by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to destroy the [[Callos planetary reactor]]; ecosystem destroyed, the planet was no longer inhabited due to sub-freezing climate
*[[Dac/Legends|Dac]]—[[137 ABY]]— oceans poisoned by the [[One Sith]].
*[[Da Soocha]]—[[137 ABY]]— oceans poisoned by the [[One Sith]].
*[[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]]—subject to [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|Base Delta Zero]] bombardment by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Duro/Legends|Duro]]—surface was bombarded sometime after [[3963 BBY]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] during their [[Mandalorian Wars|invasion]] and in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] by the [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']] and the rest of Grievous' fleet, both times causing toxic chemicals from industrial areas on the surface to contaminate the entire planet's ecosystem.
*[[Hathrox III]]—c. [[1196 BBY]]—Population destroyed by a biological weapon in a [[Hathrox III civil war|civil war]]; planet rendered uninhabitable.
*[[Humbarine/Legends|Humbarine]]—Depopulated and crust melted by orbital bombardment performed by [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']]
*[[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]]—[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]—subject to orbital bombardment by Empire
*[[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]]—[[3952 BBY]]—Was rendered uninhabitable when [[Darth Nihilus]] [[Conclave at Katarr|consumed all life]] on the planet.
*[[Osara Mundicide]]—between [[10,000 BBY|10,000]] and [[9400s BBY|9400 BBY]]— [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|Mass driver]] bombardment in the [[Tenth Alsakan Conflict]].
*[[Parcelus Minor/Legends|Parcelus Minor]]—[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]—planet with explosive vegetation, was bombarded from orbit by CIS. The planet burned for a long time.
*[[Ruisto]]—[[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]—[[Bombardment of Ruisto|Bombarded]] by the Galactic Empire. All life on the planet was wiped out.
*[[Uphrades]]—[[3643 BBY]]— Rendered uninhabitable by the [[Desolator (superweapon)|Desolator]] weapon during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].
*[[Tund/Legends|Tund]]—[[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]—Rendered incapable of supporting life by [[Rokur Gepta]]'s [[electromagnetic torpedo]].
*[[Zarracina III]]—[[11,660 BBY]]—[[Bombardment of Zarracina III|Rendered uninhabitable]] by [[Pius Dea]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces during the [[Twelfth Pius Dea Crusade]].
*[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]-[[3996 BBY]]-[[Force Light|Burned with the Force]] by the Jedi to defeat [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].<ref name="tsw6">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]]</ref>

===Inadvertent/accidental devastation===
*[[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]—circa [[300 BBY/Legends|300 BBY]]—[[Bith/Legends|Bith]] chemical war rendered planet uninhabitable by Bith.
*[[Equanus]]—[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]]—devastated when the Galactic Republic weapon testers tried a superweapon on a sun.
*[[Pammant/Legends|Pammant]]—[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]—[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] colony fractured to the core in a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] accident with a Republic [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]].
*[[Seoul 5]]—accidental chain reaction of [[Seoularian crystal]]s destroyed the surface of the planet.
*[[Uba I]], [[Uba II|II]], and [[Uba V|V]]—[[1800 BBY]]—inadvertently irradiated by their own tactical weapons, triggered by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]
*[[Varl/Legends|Varl]]—circa [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]—Planet devastated by either a supernova or a civil war among its [[Hutt/Legends|inhabitants]]

==[[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] or otherwise affected by the actions of the Yuuzhan Vong==
*[[Artorias]]—[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—Vongformed by [[Yuuzhan Vong]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]—[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]—Vongformed by the Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]—[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—all life utterly annihilated by Yuuzhan Vong
*[[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]—[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]—decimated by a Yuuzhan Vong life-destroying plague
*[[N'zoth]]—[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]—razed by Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]—[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—razed by Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Riflor/Legends|Riflor]]—after [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—razed by the Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Selvaris]]—around [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]—Vongformed by the Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Tandun III]]—[[43 ABY]]—Vongforming led to the planet's disintegration
*[[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]—[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—Planet Vongformed by the Yuuzhan Vong
*[[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]—[[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]—Much of crust destroyed by Yuuzhan Vong
